summary: Executed backend + frontend regression for DL-number migration, responsive interactions, safety lock behavior, and saved driver defaults. All executed critical flows passed.

issues: Long user names compress brand/nav area heavily on 390px width; still functional but readability is reduced.

action_items: Optional polish: truncate/ellipsis user name in mobile header to improve spacing balance.
Keep legacy backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_feature_regression_inr_safety.py updated with current API contract (it still references deprecated has_driving_licence field).
critical_code_review_comments: test_credentials source file is missing (/app/memory/test_credentials.md), which can cause auth test inconsistency across agents.
Stale regression test coverage exists in /app/backend/tests/test_feature_regression_inr_safety.py using deprecated request/response keys.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary register/login users and rides via UI/API for regression: TEST_DL_Driver, TEST_DL_Rider, test_ui_* and test_defaults_* accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: No API failures found in executed DL + safety locked-state scope. UI flow passed for mobile nav, post-ride DL validation, saved defaults (including licence + vehicle), and search list/map toggle. Previous Safety clipboard crash from iteration_1 was not reproduced in this run.
rca of the issue: No critical production bug reproduced in this cycle. One non-blocking responsive polish issue observed (long mobile username crowding header controls).
